description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% cotton, handy side pockets, two inside pockets with velcro closure on the sides just above the hem and one pocket at the back, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring and brand logo embroidered on the left legFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these shorts from urban yoga belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft; for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
